item.title: MIUI OS3.0.311.0.WAACNXM Fastboot update for Redmi K90 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K90 Max China

Codename: prague

Version: OS3.0.311.0.WAACNXM | 16.0

Size: 13.7 GB

MD5: 4178f8ced82b34dba5fcdfbc4712c0bb

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Improved system performance and user experience
Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
